commit.message:
fix(storage): align parent evidence access

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

v5.10.0 (#102)

* ## v5.10.0
- *Enhancement:* `TestSharedState` updated to enable request-based (isolated) state; with the corresponding `GetHttpRequestId()` method now made public.
- *Enhancement:* Added `ApiTesterBase.AddPreRunAction()`, `AddPostRunBeforeExpectationsAction()`, `AddPostRunAfterExpectationsAction()` and `AddPostRunAction()` to enable the addition of actions to be executed at different stages of the `Run`/`RunAsync` process for every underlying test. This will enable the addition of common pre/post processing logic without having to explicitly add to each test.
- *Enhancement:* `TEntryPoint` methods can now be specified as `static`.
- *Enhancement:* `ApiError` added implicit conversion from (`string?`, `string`) tuple to enable simplified usage; e.g. `AssertErrors(("field", "Bad Request"))` versus `AssertErrors(new ApiError("field", "Bad Request"))`.
- *Fixed:* Reset `MockHttpClientRequest` internal state when using any `With*` method to ensure correct behavior.

* Update src/UnitTestEx/Hosting/EntryPoint.cs

Co-authored-by: Copilot <175728472+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
Signed-off-by: Eric Sibly [chullybun] <eric@thesiblys.com>

* Update src/UnitTestEx/Abstractions/TesterBase.cs

Co-authored-by: Copilot <175728472+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

handleDocumentUpload was memoized with an empty dependency array, so it
kept the initial accountType='company' and skipped persona-fisica CF
autofill logic. Rebind it to the current account type.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: normalize extracted signup text for CF matching

Normalize source text before codice fiscale matching so registration
autofill still works when PDF extraction inserts spaces or punctuation.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: picker drawer overlap with single result

Float truncation in overlay.rs: (72.8 / 18.2) as usize = 3 instead
of 4 due to f32 precision loss from subtraction (panel_bottom -
panel_top). This made available_lines=3, num_visible=0, causing the
status line and result to render at the same y coordinate.

Fix: round to nearest integer instead of truncating.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

repository.name: Bloom
repository.description: A local-first, Vim-modal note editor for networked thinking. Built in Rust.

commit.message:
feat: use AI registration profile for signup autofill

Consume registration_profile from analyze-public to autofill fiscal
code, city, company name, VAT number, and sector when available.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: indexer never writes files, vault-wide block ID uniqueness

Remove block ID assignment from the indexer thread — it was writing
directly to disk via atomic_write(), bypassing the self-write hash
guard and causing false reload prompts.

Block IDs are now assigned only when a file is open in the editor,
via ensure_block_ids() on Insert→Normal transitions. Files without
IDs are indexed as-is.

Also adds vault-wide collision avoidance:
- BloomEditor.known_block_ids cache, refreshed on IndexComplete
- compute_block_id_assignments() accepts optional known IDs set
- New IDs inserted into cache immediately on assignment

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

repository.name: Bloom
repository.description: A local-first, Vim-modal note editor for networked thinking. Built in Rust.

commit.message:
refactor: centralize autosave as debounced timer

Replace 4 scattered autosave_if_dirty() calls with a single
schedule_autosave() at the end of handle_key(). Uses buffer's
existing is_dirty() (version != clean_version) to detect mutations.

- handle_key() = handle_key_inner() + schedule_autosave()
- 300ms debounce: rapid edits/undo/redo coalesce into one save
- Insert mode suppressed (fires on Insert→Normal transition)
- save_page() clears deadline to prevent redundant flush
- Removes undo/redo-specific deadline special cases

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Use source_text from analyze-public to detect codice fiscale and partita IVA
for persona fisica and registration uploads instead of relying on

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: pass NEMOCLAW_API_URL as build arg so rewrites resolve correctly

Next.js rewrites are evaluated at build time. Without the build arg,
NEMOCLAW_API_URL was undefined during docker build, falling back to
nemoclaw.pezserv.org (wrong host). Now passes the correct internal
URL http://terminia-api:3100 as a Docker build arg.

Also passes NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_* as build args since Next.js inlines
these at build time.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: force-dynamic on bandi pages to prevent build-time prerender

Supabase client requires env vars at runtime, not build time.
Replace revalidate=3600 with dynamic='force-dynamic' to skip SSG.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: use analyze-public endpoint for registration document upload

- AI extraction works before account creation

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: suppress false reload prompts during undo/redo

Two-part fix for file watcher echoing our own saves back as external
changes:

1. Content-hash self-write detection: hash every save, suppress watcher
   events whose disk content matches a stored hash (bounded deque of 8).

2. Undo/redo autosave debounce: set 300ms deadline instead of saving
   immediately, coalescing rapid undo sequences into a single write.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
feat: undo delta persistence with keyframe support

Store EditDelta (offset, delete_len, insert_text) per undo node instead
of full buffer content. Every 50th node stores a keyframe (full text)
bounding chain length. BFS restore on load reconstructs Ropey structural
sharing. Backward compatible with existing all-content format.

Storage: ~25 MB → ~540 KB for reference vault (20 pages × 500 nodes).

Also adds lab design docs for block ID metadata and undo delta stress
testing (18 correctness scenarios, 5 failure modes).

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

pdf-object: implement ASCII85Decode filter

Add `Filter::ASCII85Decode` variant, map the `"ASCII85Decode"` name in
the `From` impl, and implement `Filter::decode_ascii85` using Horner's
method with wrapping arithmetic. Wire it into `StreamObject::data()`.

Includes 7 unit tests covering full groups, the `z` shorthand, partial
final groups, whitespace skipping, the `~>` EOD marker, and invalid
character errors.

commit.message:
fix: update Netlify secrets scanning configuration and improve placeholder usage

- Adjusted SECRETS_SCAN_ENABLED and SECRETS_SCAN_OMIT_PATHS in netlify.toml to further reduce false positives during scanning.
- Replaced remaining sk-ant- placeholders in batch_fix.py with safer alternatives to enhance security and clarity.
- Ensured comprehensive coverage of paths to omit from secrets scanning, reinforcing protection against accidental exposure.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

refactor: replace week-keyed corrections with date-based settlements

Migrate overhour corrections from {year-week: seconds} map to
OverhourSettlement[] with explicit dates. This simplifies the data
model and enables proper six-month sliding window resolution.

Key changes:
- Extract settlement logic into src/utils/settlements.ts
- Add comprehensive unit tests (11 tests)
- Migrate legacy corrections on read via normalizeSettlements
- Replace year/week inputs with date picker in UI
- Reuse buildWeeklyOverhourEntries and resolveOverhourBuckets
  in both useLifetimeStatistics and useSixMonthOverhours

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Update locale strings (#8339)

This PR updates the locale translation strings extracted from source
code.

## Triggered By
Commit: `3fbe7208901ec5992128e85901ecc43d5f368f8b`
Message: fix: Donation fund Active field always shows "Yes" and changes
not retained (#8319)

The Donation Fund editor showed all funds as Active="Yes" regardless of
saved state, and setting a fund to "No" had no effect. Three bugs in
`src/DonationFundEditor.php` were responsible.

## Bugs fixed

- **Reading — `boolval('false') === true`**: The `fun_Active` column
stores the literal strings `'true'`/`'false'` in an
`enum('true','false')` DB column. `boolval()` treats any non-empty
string as truthy, so `'false'` was read back as active.
  ```php
  // Before — always true for stored string 'false'
  $aActiveFields[$row] = boolval($donation->getActive());

  // After
  $aActiveFields[$row] = $donation->getActive() === 'true';
  ```

- **Writing — PHP bool stored into `enum('true','false')` column**:
`setActive()` received a PHP boolean, which Propel casts to `'1'`/`''` —
neither is a valid enum value, so MySQL silently rejected the write.
  ```php
  // Before — stores invalid enum value
  $donation->setActive($_POST[$iFieldID . 'active'] == 1);

  // After
$isActive = isset($_POST[$iFieldID . 'active']) && $_POST[$iFieldID .
'active'] == 1;
  $donation->setActive($isActive ? 'true' : 'false');
  ```

- **Delete action — assignment `=` instead of comparison `==`**: `if
($sAction = 'delete' && strlen($sFund) > 0)` overwrote `$sAction` with a
boolean, meaning any request with a `Fund` query param (regardless of
`Action`) would trigger a deletion.
  ```php
  // Before
  if ($sAction = 'delete' && strlen($sFund) > 0) {
  // After
  if ($sAction == 'delete' && strlen($sFund) > 0) {
  ```

<!-- START COPILOT CODING AGENT TIPS -->
---

💡 You can make Copilot smarter by setting up custom instructions,
customizing its development environment and configuring Model Context
Protocol (MCP) servers. Learn more [Copilot coding agent
tips](https://gh.io/copilot-coding-agent-tips) in the docs.

---------

Co-authored-by: copilot-swe-agent[bot]
<198982749+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: DawoudIO <554959+DawoudIO@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: George Dawoud <george@dawouds.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

## Changes
- Updated `locale/terms/messages.po` with new/modified translatable
strings
- Updated JSON locale keys

## Next Steps
- Review the new strings that need translation
- Merge this PR to update the base locale file
- Upload to POEditor for translation if needed

Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

The Donation Fund editor showed all funds as Active="Yes" regardless of
saved state, and setting a fund to "No" had no effect. Three bugs in
`src/DonationFundEditor.php` were responsible.

## Bugs fixed

- **Reading — `boolval('false') === true`**: The `fun_Active` column
stores the literal strings `'true'`/`'false'` in an
`enum('true','false')` DB column. `boolval()` treats any non-empty
string as truthy, so `'false'` was read back as active.
  ```php
  // Before — always true for stored string 'false'
  $aActiveFields[$row] = boolval($donation->getActive());

  // After
  $aActiveFields[$row] = $donation->getActive() === 'true';
  ```

- **Writing — PHP bool stored into `enum('true','false')` column**:
`setActive()` received a PHP boolean, which Propel casts to `'1'`/`''` —
neither is a valid enum value, so MySQL silently rejected the write.
  ```php
  // Before — stores invalid enum value
  $donation->setActive($_POST[$iFieldID . 'active'] == 1);

  // After
$isActive = isset($_POST[$iFieldID . 'active']) && $_POST[$iFieldID .
'active'] == 1;
  $donation->setActive($isActive ? 'true' : 'false');
  ```

- **Delete action — assignment `=` instead of comparison `==`**: `if
($sAction = 'delete' && strlen($sFund) > 0)` overwrote `$sAction` with a
boolean, meaning any request with a `Fund` query param (regardless of
`Action`) would trigger a deletion.
  ```php
  // Before
  if ($sAction = 'delete' && strlen($sFund) > 0) {
  // After
  if ($sAction == 'delete' && strlen($sFund) > 0) {
  ```

commit.message:
fix: Pin NumPy < 2.0 to fix macOS ARM backend crash

- Pin numpy<2.0 in requirements.txt to avoid NumPy 2.x breaking changes
- Add NumPy hidden imports to backend_server.spec for PyInstaller compatibility
- Fix requirements.txt encoding (UTF-16 → UTF-8)

Fixes: Backend crashes with 'ModuleNotFoundError: No module named numpy._core._exceptions'
on macOS Apple Silicon (M1/M2/M3/M4) due to NumPy 2.x internal module restructuring
that PyInstaller doesn't properly bundle.
